title: Device Profile
description: Device profile for communication hardware. Defines the ST struct type (fields) and the register map (how each field maps to a protocol register).

name.description: Struct type name in generated ST code (e.g., 'Wago750352', 'AbbAcs580'). Must be a valid IEC 61131-3 identifier.

protocol.description: Primary protocol this profile is designed for. The profile may work with compatible protocols (e.g., modbus-tcp and modbus-rtu share register maps).

fields.description: Process I/O fields. Each field becomes a member of the generated ST struct, and maps to a specific register/address on the device.

field.description: A single I/O field — maps an ST struct member to a device register.

name.description: Field name in the ST struct (e.g., 'DI_0', 'SPEED_REF', 'FAULT'). Must be a valid IEC 61131-3 identifier.

type.description: IEC 61131-3 data type of this field.

direction.description: I/O direction. 'input': read from device (device → PLC). 'output': written to device (PLC → device). 'inout': both directions.

register.description: Register mapping — how this field is read/written on the physical device.
Protocol register mapping for a field.

bit.description: Bit position within the register (0-15). Used for BOOL fields packed into a word register.

scale.description: Scaling factor: ST_value = raw_register_value * scale. For example, scale=0.1 means register value 450 → ST value 45.0.

offset.description: Offset applied after scaling: ST_value = raw * scale + offset.

unit.description: Engineering unit (documentation only, not enforced). E.g., 'Hz', 'A', 'Nm', 'kW', 'degC'.

byte_order.description: Byte order for multi-byte registers. Most Modbus devices use big-endian.

word_count.description: Number of registers to read for this field (default 1). Use 2 for 32-bit values (DINT, REAL).
